name: Mandel Kager Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Refrigerate the dough for 2 hours or until it can be easily handled.
3. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
4. Place the balls on ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Stamp each ball lightly with a flat-bottomed glass covered with a damp cloth.
6. Beat together the egg yolk and water in a small bowl.
7. Brush the tops of the cookies with the egg wash.
8. Place an almond half on top of each cookie.
9. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Makes approximately 3 1/2 dozen cookies, depending on the size of the balls.
